text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first concert is coming up fast. As<n>I'm handing
out flyers by the school<n>gates with Light Hello and
the others...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A couple students express interest in<n>helping out!
Our team grows as we<n>approach our concert!
